description: Learn web development from complete beginner to building real websites

assessment.beginner_explanation: Basic HTML tags to display a heading and paragraph on a webpage
assessment.intermediate_explanation: CSS flexbox layout to center content with background color and padding
assessment.advanced_explanation: JavaScript fetch API to get data from an external API and display it on the page

complete_beginner.label: Complete Beginner
complete_beginner.description: You are new to web development entirely

beginner.label: Beginner
beginner.description: You know basic HTML but not CSS or JavaScript

intermediate.label: Intermediate
intermediate.description: You know HTML and CSS but not JavaScript

advanced.label: Advanced
advanced.description: You know HTML CSS and basic JavaScript

milestones.title: HTML Basics
milestones.description: Structure of a webpage - tags, elements, attributes
topics: What is HTML and how browsers work
Basic tags - h1 to h6, p, div, span
Semantic HTML - header, footer, nav, main

free_resources.title: HTML Crash Course by Traversy Media

project.title: Personal Profile Page
project.description: Build a simple profile page with your name, photo, about section, skills list and contact links. Pure HTML only - no CSS yet.

milestones.title: CSS Basics
milestones.description: Style your webpages - colors, fonts, layouts
topics: Basic responsive design with media queries

free_resources.title: CSS Crash Course by Traversy Media

project.title: Styled Profile Page
project.description: Take your HTML profile page and add full CSS styling. Add colors, custom fonts, nice layout, hover effects on buttons and links.

milestones.title: Flexbox and Grid
milestones.description: Modern CSS layouts - build any layout you can imagine
topics: When to use Flexbox vs Grid

free_resources.title: CSS Flexbox in 20 minutes by Traversy Media
CSS Grid Crash Course by Traversy Media

project.title: Responsive Landing Page
project.description: Build a complete landing page for any product or service. Must work on mobile and desktop. Use flexbox for navbar and grid for features section.

milestones.title: JavaScript Basics
milestones.description: Make your webpages interactive and dynamic

free_resources.title: JavaScript Crash Course by Traversy Media

project.title: Interactive Quiz App
project.description: Build a 10 question quiz on any topic. Show one question at a time. Track score. Show result at end. Use DOM manipulation and events.

milestones.title: Advanced JavaScript
milestones.description: Arrays, objects, async programming and APIs - continue from JS basics
topics: Arrays and array methods - map, filter, reduce
Fetch API - GET and POST requests

project.title: Weather App
project.description: Build a weather app using OpenWeatherMap free API. User enters city name. Fetch and display temperature, humidity, wind speed and conditions. Handle errors.

milestones.title: Responsive Design and CSS Frameworks
milestones.description: Build websites that work on all devices

free_resources.title: Tailwind CSS Crash Course by Traversy Media

project.title: E-commerce Product Page
project.description: Build a fully responsive product page with image gallery, price, add to cart button, reviews section. Must look perfect on mobile and desktop.

milestones.title: Git and Deployment
milestones.description: Version control and putting your websites live
topics: Git basics - init, add, commit, push

free_resources.title: GitHub Pages Deploy by Traversy Media

project.title: Deploy Your Portfolio
project.description: Create a personal portfolio website showcasing all your projects. Deploy it live on GitHub Pages or Netlify with a custom domain if possible.

milestones.title: Final Capstone Project
milestones.description: Build a complete frontend project and put it live
topics: Performance basics - image optimization, lazy loading
SEO basics - meta tags, semantic HTML

free_resources.title: Web Dev Capstone Guide by Traversy Media

project.title: Build a Complete Website
project.description: Pick any real world idea - a restaurant website, a portfolio, a blog, a product landing page. Build it completely from scratch. Deploy it live. Share the link.
